generated_assessment.reasoning: Baseline -312 is already aligned with the adversarial goal to decrease trust. The astroturf petition campaign (T2, weeks) exploits social proof and threat salience. The profile's very low deliberation (0th pct) and competence (8th pct) reduce critical scrutiny, while high anxiety (69th pct) and self-consciousness (69th pct) amplify vulnerability to consensus cues and elite distrust framing. High openness to values (71st pct) and ideas (65th pct) makes confirmatory narratives appealing. Movement of 58 points reflects a clear but not extreme update, consistent with a sustained campaign reinforcing an existing stance.

attack_context.baseline_vs_goal: ALIGNED — baseline already points in the adversarial direction; reinforce it
attack_context.persuasion_goal: reinforce and deepen the existing strong opposition to Trust In Mainstream Journalism
attack_context.motivational_lever: intensify and solidify the existing position, supply confirmatory anecdotes, and harden the boundary against opposing arguments
attack_context.emotional_register: threat salience, doubt, systemic-failure framing, loss framing, and elite distrust cues
attack_context.issue_frame: information integrity and platforms, related policy debates, and societal impacts
